Issues: The image is a very basic, minimalist graphic. While this style has commercial appeal (especially for digital backgrounds, T-shirts, or simple vector art), it lacks unique artistic complexity or a distinct visual hook that would make it highly competitive in a broad art market.
The composition is simple and standard (a skyline), which limits its ability to attract a general audience unless marketed strictly toward graphic design or abstract concepts.
The color palette is simple (orange/brown tones), which could be refined to offer a more sophisticated or unique aesthetic if the goal is high-end sales.
